problem id: 030479a6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  00011011 -> 11000000
  01001001 -> 01000010
  00001100 -> 00000000
  11010111 -> 11000110
  11011001 -> 01000110
  00000011 -> 11000000
  11100111 -> 11000111
  00100011 -> 11000001
  01001011 -> 11000010
  11100011 -> 11000111

query: 11010001
predicted answer: 01000110
